segments.text: And as Jesus passed by, he saw a man which was blind from his birth.
And his disciples asked him, saying,
Master, who did sin, this man, or his parents, that he was born blind?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Jesus answered,
When he had thus spoken, he spat on the ground, and made clay of the spittle, and he anointed the eyes of the blind man with the clay,
And said unto him, (which is by interpretation, Sent.)
He went his way therefore, and washed, and came seeing.
The neighbours therefore, and they which before had seen him that he was blind, said,
Is not this he that sat and begged?
segments.speaker: Neighbours

heading: The Healing of the Blind Man

segments.text: This is he:
segments.speaker: Some

segments.text: He is like him:
segments.speaker: Others

segments.text: I am he.
segments.speaker: Blind Man

segments.text: How were thine eyes opened?
segments.speaker: Neighbours

segments.text: A man that is called Jesus made clay, and anointed mine eyes, and said unto me, Go to the pool of Siloam, and wash: and I went and washed, and I received sight.
segments.speaker: Blind Man

segments.text: Where is he?
segments.speaker: Neighbours

segments.text: I know not.
segments.speaker: Blind Man

segments.text: They brought to the Pharisees him that aforetime was blind.
This man is not of God, because he keepeth not the sabbath day.
segments.speaker: Some Pharisees

segments.text: How can a man that is a sinner do such miracles?
segments.speaker: Others

segments.text: And there was a division among them.
What sayest thou of him, that he hath opened thine eyes?
segments.speaker: Pharisees

segments.text: He is a prophet.
segments.speaker: Blind Man

segments.text: These words spake his parents, because they feared the Jews: for the Jews had agreed already, that if any man did confess that he was Christ, he should be put out of the synagogue.
Jesus heard that they had cast him out; and when he had found him, he said unto him,
Who is he, Lord, that I might believe on him?
segments.speaker: Blind Man

segments.text: Lord, I believe.
segments.speaker: Blind Man

segments.text: And he worshipped him.
Are we blind also?
segments.speaker: Pharisees
